ogTitle: Hobartville vs Hobbys Yards: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hobartville and Hobbys Yards.
heading: Hobartville vs Hobbys Yards — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hobartville, New South Wales and Hobbys Yards, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hobbys Yards has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hobartville (51/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hobartville or Hobbys Yards safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hobartville has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Hobbys Yards scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hobartville scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Hobbys Yards scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hobartville or Hobbys Yards?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hobbys Yards has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
